View.Name: {3DA5B9C4-9F09-4707-9BEC-2CAC60FF655D}
View.CustomFormatter: {"kanbanProps":{"hideSelection":false,"formatter":{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-container sp-card-container-noPadding"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-white sp-css-borderColor-neutralLight sp-card-borderHighlight sp-card-subContainer sp-card-subContainer-borderRadius"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!PI.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$PI]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content sp-card-highlightedContent","role":"heading","aria-level":"3"},"txtContent":"=if ([$PI] == '', '–', [$PI])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$ServicesReceived] == '', 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!ServicesReceived.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$ServicesReceived]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$ServicesReceived] == '', '–', [$ServicesReceived])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$Date.displayValue] == '','none', ''"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Date.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"=if ([$Date.displayValue] == '', '–', [$Date.displayValue])","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Date.displayValue] == '', '–', [$Date.displayValue])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$Recipient] == '', 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Recipient.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$Recipient]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Recipient] == '', '–', [$Recipient])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$Status] == '', 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Status.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-content sp-card-formatterRef"},"children":[{"columnFormatterReference":"[$Status]"}]}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$Project_x0020_PI_x0020_or_x0020_] == '', 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Project_x0020_PI_x0020_or_x0020_.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$Project_x0020_PI_x0020_or_x0020_]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Project_x0020_PI_x0020_or_x0020_] == '', '–', [$Project_x0020_PI_x0020_or_x0020_])"}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$FollowUpDate.displayValue] == '','none', ''"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!FollowUpDate.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-content sp-card-formatterRef"},"children":[{"columnFormatterReference":"[$FollowUpDate]"}]}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if ([$Notes] == '', 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label sp-card-boldText"},"txtContent":"[!Notes.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$Notes]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content sp-card-multiline"},"txtContent":"=if ([$Notes] == '', '–', [$Notes])","style":{"-webkit-line-clamp":"2","height":"40px"}}],"attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"}}]}],"templateId":"KanbanCardDesigner100"},"designerConfig":[1,0,"PI",0,"ServicesReceived",0,"Date",0,"Recipient",0,"Status",0,"Project_x0020_PI_x0020_or_x0020_",0,"FollowUpDate",0,"Notes"]}}
